examples: His methods were not dissimilar to those used by Freud.
It would be difficult to find two men who were more dissimilar.
And a room with books in it induces, at least in some, a feeling not dissimilar to that of a fire in the fireplace on a cold winter's night.
Collection by various kinds of cameras and electronic intercepts suffers from problems not entirely dissimilar.
Celgene (nasdaq: CELG - news - people ), there's a dissimilar quandary.
